A PPENDIX B Useful Functions, Integrals and Sums

Collected here are some calculations and formulas that are espeically pertinent in probability modeling. We begin with several exponential integrals, the first and simplest being Z e‚ąíx dx = ‚ąíe‚ąíx . (B.1)
